rationale: The proposed Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption increase governs property tax appraisal exclusions. Educ. Code §61.822 governs core curriculum and credit transferability among higher education institutions. The two provisions address unrelated subjects with no operative intersection.
quote: Sec. 61.822. TRANSFER OF CREDITS; CORE CURRICULUM. (a) The board shall encourage the transferability of lower division course credit among institutions of higher education.
_note: No conflict identified. The rule_text concerns higher education core curriculum and credit transfer; the proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemptions. No statutory linkage between these provisions was found.
